ingredients_text: Black Pudding (50%) [Water, Beef Fat (19%), 𝐎𝐚𝐭𝐦𝐞𝐚𝐥 (18%), Onion, Beef Rind, Bacon Trim With Added Water (4.5%) (Pork, Water, Salt, Dextrose, Sea Salt, Sugar, Antioxidant: Sodium Ascorbate; Preservatives: Potassium Nitrate, Sodium Nitrite), Dried Beef Blood (4%), 𝐖𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐭 𝐅𝐥𝐨𝐮𝐫 (𝐖𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐭 𝐅𝐥𝐨𝐮𝐫, Calcium Carbonate, Iron, Niacin, Thiamin), Beef (2.5%), Salt, Flavourings, Dried Onion, Dried Thyme]. White Pudding (50%) [Water, 𝐎𝐚𝐭𝐦𝐞𝐚𝐥 (17%), Pork (14%), Bacon Trim With Added Water (13%) (Pork, Water, Salt, Dextrose, Sea Salt, Sugar, Antioxidant: Sodium Ascorbate; Preservatives: Potassium Nitrate, Sodium Nitrite), Onion (11%), 𝐖𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐭 𝐅𝐥𝐨𝐮𝐫 (𝐖𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐭 𝐅𝐥𝐨𝐮𝐫, Calcium Carbonate, Iron, Niacin, Thiamin), Pork Fat (4.5%), Flavourings, Dried Onion, Spices, Dextrose, Salt, Dried Thyme].
